title: Even Better Wandering Trader Trades
description: The Wandering Trader's got new stock!
body:
This is a simple datapack that adds brand new trades to the Wandering Trader. These trades include some enchanted books, polished stone, or even a Diamond if you're lucky enough!

![A Wandering Trader's menu](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1598/633/diamond-png.png)

   Many rarer items that the Wandering Trader can sell have very little stock, just so that the new trades aren't overpowered. (Such as only being able to buy 1 or 2 items.) The Wandering Trader will even take some new items off of you like Copper tools and basic supplies!



#
Curseforge page is [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/even-better-wandering-trader-trades)
#
Report bugs [Here](https://discord.gg/65Y5pn2TAW)



Go to my [Youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuvzUmcTrqXztT7R1oJGQeg) for more updates and info.
